languages.text: "Какая... экстравагантная практика". {n}В темных зрачках Эоганна вспыхивает исследовательский интерес.{/n} "Смею надеяться, что медикарии, подвластные династии Чорда, проверили серое вещество донора на наличие патогенных субстанций".

"What an... extravagant practice." {n}Research interest flares within Eogunn's dark eyes.{/n} "I venture to hope that the medicae officers of the Chorda dynasty have screened the donor's grey matter for pathogenic substances."
languages.original_text: "Какая... экстравагантная практика". {n}В темных зрачках Эоганна вспыхивает исследовательский интерес.{/n} "Смею надеяться, что медикарии, подвластные династии Чорда, проверили серое вещество донора на наличие патогенных субстанций".

traits.locale_text: "What an... extravagant practice." {n}Research interest flares within Eogunn's dark eyes.{/n} "I venture to hope that the medicae of the Chorda dynasty have screened the donor's grey matter for pathogenic substances."

"What an... extravagant practice." {n}Research interest flares within Eogunn's dark eyes.{/n} "I venture to hope that the medicae officers of the Chorda dynasty have screened the donor's grey matter for pathogenic substances."

languages.text: «Es una práctica... extravagante». {n}El interés investigativo aflora en los ojos oscuros de Eogunn.{/n} «Me atrevo a esperar que los oficiales medicae de la dinastía Chorda hayan analizado la materia gris del donante en busca de patógenos».
languages.original_text: "What an... extravagant practice." {n}Research interest flares within Eogunn's dark eyes.{/n} "I venture to hope that the medicae officers of the Chorda dynasty have screened the donor's grey matter for pathogenic substances."

traits.locale_text: «Es una práctica... extravagante». {n}El interés investigativo aflora en los ojos oscuros de Eogunn.{/n} «Me atrevo a esperar que los oficiales medicae de la dinastía Chorda hayan analizado la materia gris del donante en busca de patógenos».

languages.text: “真是……相当奢侈的做法。”{n}研究的兴致在伊奥贡漆黑的眼眸中闪过。{/n}“我斗胆说一句，但愿库尔达王朝的医务官们已经筛查过捐赠者的脑灰质，确认其中不存在致病物质了。”
languages.original_text: "What an... extravagant practice." {n}Research interest flares within Eogunn's dark eyes.{/n} "I venture to hope that the medicae officers of the Chorda dynasty have screened the donor's grey matter for pathogenic substances."

traits.locale_text: “真是……相当奢侈的做法。”{n}研究的兴致在伊奥贡漆黑的眼眸中闪过。{/n}“我斗胆说一句，但愿库尔达王朝的医务官们已经筛查过捐赠者的脑灰质，确认其中不存在致病物质了。”

languages.text: "Was für eine ... extravagante Praxis." {n}In Eogunns dunklen Augen flammt wissenschaftliches Interesse auf.{/n} "Ich wage zu hoffen, dass die Medicae-Offiziere der Chorda-Dynastie die graue Materie des Spenders auf pathogene Substanzen geprüft haben."
languages.original_text: "What an... extravagant practice." {n}Research interest flares within Eogunn's dark eyes.{/n} "I venture to hope that the medicae officers of the Chorda dynasty have screened the donor's grey matter for pathogenic substances."

traits.locale_text: "Was für eine ... extravagante Praxis." {n}In Eogunns dunklen Augen flammt wissenschaftliches Interesse auf.{/n} "Ich wage zu hoffen, dass die Medicae-Offiziere der Chorda-Dynastie die graue Materie des Spenders auf pathogene Substanzen geprüft haben."

languages.text: « En voilà, une pratique... extravagante, {n}songe Eogunn alors que la flamme de la curiosité scientifique embrase ses yeux sombres.{/n} J'ose espérer que les officiers de medicae de la dynastie Chorda ont analysé la matière grise du donneur afin de dépister d'éventuelles substances pathogènes. »
languages.original_text: "What an... extravagant practice." {n}Research interest flares within Eogunn's dark eyes.{/n} "I venture to hope that the medicae officers of the Chorda dynasty have screened the donor's grey matter for pathogenic substances."

traits.locale_text: « En voilà, une pratique... extravagante, {n}songe Eogunn alors que la flamme de la curiosité scientifique embrase ses yeux sombres.{/n} J'ose espérer que les officiers de medicae de la dynastie Chorda ont analysé la matière grise du donneur afin de dépister d'éventuelles substances pathogènes. »

languages.text: "Ne... Aşırıya kaçan bir uygulama." {n}Eogunn'un koyu renk gözlerinde araştırmacı bir ilgi alevleniyor.{/n} "Chorda hanedanlığının sıhhiye subaylarının, donörün gri maddesini patojenik maddelere karşı taramış olmasını umma cüreti gösteriyorum."
languages.original_text: "What an... extravagant practice." {n}Research interest flares within Eogunn's dark eyes.{/n} "I venture to hope that the medicae officers of the Chorda dynasty have screened the donor's grey matter for pathogenic substances."

traits.locale_text: "Ne... Aşırıya kaçan bir uygulama." {n}Eogunn'un koyu renk gözlerinde araştırmacı bir ilgi alevleniyor.{/n} "Chorda hanedanlığının sıhhiye subaylarının, donörün gri maddesini patojenik maddelere karşı taramış olmasını umma cüreti gösteriyorum."

languages.text: 「贅沢な習慣ですね」{n}エオグンの暗い瞳に研究への興味が燃え上がる.{/n}「コード王朝では、病原物質を献体の脳に検査していることでしょう」
languages.original_text: "What an... extravagant practice." {n}Research interest flares within Eogunn's dark eyes.{/n} "I venture to hope that the medicae officers of the Chorda dynasty have screened the donor's grey matter for pathogenic substances."

traits.locale_text: 「贅沢な習慣ですね」{n}エオグンの暗い瞳に研究への興味が燃え上がる.{/n}「コード王朝では、病原物質を献体の脳に検査していることでしょう」
